_comment: Persistent ledger of questions from data/findquestions-bank.json that have already been used as the primary topic of an auto-generated blog post. The auto-blog GitHub Action reads this file, picks an unused question, generates a post answering it, and commits both the new post and an updated copy of this file. Pre-populated with question IDs that are already answered by existing posts in content/blog so the action doesn't generate near-duplicates. Do not edit by hand unless you intend to recycle a question.
